Beats I Made in My Room (2021)
Brian Powers
4.50 from 4 ratings
Genres
Descriptors
Beats I Made in My Room (2021)
Brian Powers
Review by Shollyboster
breathtaking
this is a really good album that I did not make and am not reviewing for the sake of advertising it.

it certainly is an album about being a college student and hating capitalism. it's cool how the songs mix into each other.

I really liked when the person who is not me who rapped on this made a beat with a kitchen stove. and the microwave. I thought the song about being far right was kind of weird until he clarified it was a joke at the end el oh el.

there's a little bit of math rap in here. that's cool
